steps.title: Use the comparison phrase
steps.content: The phrase "still lower than" means the completed statement must name a volcano with a deformation rate higher than Sierra Negra's rate.

steps.title: Pick the higher rate
steps.content: A, C, and D name volcanoes with rates below Sierra Negra's 2.9 centimeters per month. The remaining volcano is higher, at 3.4 centimeters per month. The answer is B.
